confirmed_semantic_differences: PR34 introduces TumMetricGeometryRefinementModel as a new subclass of PR33 TumMetricDepthSplatfactoModel.
The new get_loss_dict performs schedule handling and CPU scalar extraction on every step.
The new step_post_backward has a different control path and calls JSONL instrumentation with CUDA-memory, quantile, and gradient reads.
R0 chooses CONSTANT_010 and STOCK_REFINEMENT, but still executes the new wrapper methods and has a nonempty instrumentation_path.
